report_name: NIST Finalizes SP 800-172r3, Toughening Security Rules for Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI)

identities.name: National Institute of Standards and Technology
identities.description: The U.S. National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) is the government agency that published the final version of Special Publication (SP) 800-172r3, which outlines enhanced security requirements for protecting Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI).

identities.name: Defense Industrial Base
identities.description: Organizations within the Defense Industrial Base (DIB) are affected by the new enhanced security requirements in NIST SP 800-172r3 for protecting Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI).

identities.name: Universities and Research Institutions
identities.description: Universities and research institutions that receive federal grants and handle Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI) are affected by the new enhanced security requirements in NIST SP 800-172r3.
